incident report (jp): minor credential-spray on hr portal at Hoshino Robotics KK (fictional), detected by mfa anomalies; no service outage on core systems.
time window: 2026-06-02 06:10–07:05 jst; 14 employee accounts auto-locked; no lateral movement observed.
impact: no leakage of 個人情報 under appi; payroll system stores no 個人番号 (my number) and tokenized employee ids only; zero exfiltration in gateway logs.
appi response: incident logged, dpo notified, retention policy verified; notification to employees done via portal; no regulator notice triggered per internal threshold and public jfsa faq.
operations: due-diligence dataroom for contemplated share acquisition of Onami Tech KK (fictional) paused for 2 hours; 取締役会 briefing remains on schedule.
ir draft: language limited to previously announced mid-term plan (public tdnet release 2025-02-14); embargo for updated note set to 2026-07-15 09:00 jst pending final sign-off.
mae/mac: this event does not constitute a material adverse change under the draft share transfer agreement (amounts and percentages remain blanked in the term sheet).
fiea check: no undisclosed enumerated material facts about earnings, dividends, or tender offers are implicated; risk rating “low”; references limited to public-source cybersecurity guidance.
board memo v1.3: incident timeline, vendor sla excerpts, and deal checklist appended; figures redacted; placeholders retained for counsel comments.
employee comms: notices sent from role mailboxes hr@hoshino.example.jp and ir@hoshino.example.jp; no personal emails used; training link points to internal lms.
pm notes: patch rollout and password reset complete; spa-day voucher pilot for wellness week is unaffected and proceeds per schedule.
esg context: cyber governance disclosure remains aligned with our public sustainability report fy2024 and tse practice; no change to kpis or spt narratives.
third-party: Sango Cloud Services GK (fictional) ticket closed with “monitor” status; no customer pii processed in the affected module.
internal research note: sector review shows q3 phishing spikes based on public cert-j summaries; recommend reinforcing edr rules only.
document control: general internal use; share with audit and legal affairs office; do not submit to tdnet before the embargo date noted above.
